arts.ttl: Liverpool linked with Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement amid Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: There are not many players at Bayer Leverkusen that have not caught the eye in the last season, but they did manage to hang onto the majority of their players this summer. However there are a number of sides circling their best players for next summer. Real Madrid and Barcelona have both been linked with […] The post Liverpool linked with Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement amid Real Madrid interest appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Mbappe's best friend makes decision on Real Madrid reunion
arts.sum: PSG are in talks with Achraf Hakimi over a contract extension, according to Fabrizio Romano. During Kylian Mbappe's time at PSG, he formed a close bond with the Morocco international to the point where Hakimi was described as the new Real Madrid star's best friend.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Vinicius Jr has 'already been told' he has won the Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr is among the favourites to win the Ballon d'Or this year after his stunning season for Real Madrid and reports from Spain claim that he has 'already been told' that he has won the award

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid could offer £40m player to Arsenal in a swap deal for William Saliba
arts.sum: William Saliba is a very special player, and Arsenal are very lucky to have him. The Frenchman is undoubtedly one of the best in the...

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham 'not in favour' of resting after fresh shoulder injury
arts.sum: And while AS reported the following day that he was in "severe pain" and waiting to see how he responded on Monday, Carlo Ancelotti declared in a pre-match press conference ahead of Tuesday night's upcoming La Liga game against Alaves that there is no lasting damage and no concern over Bellingham's availability. Bellingham missed one Madrid game last November when he dislocated his shoulder, with the decision made, and since stuck to, to treat it without surgery.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have to heed Real Madrid warning or stadium deal could be in jeopardy
arts.sum: Daniel Levy will understand that Tottenham have one of the best football grounds not just in the Premier League but in the whole of Europe. A ground that can host a variety of other events than its main purpose. arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior to be Crowned 2024 Ballon dOr Winner
arts.sum: The winner of the 2024 Ballon d'Or has reportedly been informed ahead of October's ceremony.
